_about: Mock numbers for the 'Scalability story' page (web-demo/scalability.html). All values are synthetic and editable in one place: changing a number here rewrites every tile and re-shapes the chart on the page automatically. See web-demo/scalability.js for derived-value formulas. Schema v2: on-prem framing — instances no longer carry an hourly $ rate; economics are expressed as 'API cost avoided per day' against a Frontier-API comparator.

comparators.label: Frontier LLM API (per-call)
comparators.notes: Synthetic: 1500 input + 800 output tokens at a typical $1 / $3 per 1M token rate (~Haiku-class pricing). Does not include orchestration, retries, or egress.

comparators.label: Frontier LLM API (research-class)
comparators.notes: Synthetic: ~12k input + 3k output tokens per research task at premium model pricing. Excludes vector store and retrieval costs.

instances.label: Intel Xeon CWF
instances.subtitle: 576 vCPU · 1536 GB
instances.notes: Dual-socket Clearwater Forest reference: 288 E-cores per socket, ~3 GB / core. Owned hardware — no cloud hourly rate; capital and power costs are out of scope for this page.

instances.label: Intel GNR
instances.subtitle: 256 vCPU · 1024 GB
instances.notes: Dual-socket Granite Rapids reference: 128 P-cores per socket, ~4 GB / core. AMX accelerates the SLM offload path. Owned hardware — no cloud hourly rate.

workloads.label: Terminal agent (small)
workloads.subtitle: engineering / shell tasks
workloads.notes: One agent ≈ 1 vCPU + 2 GB resident; per-task wall-clock 8s end-to-end including a single LLM round-trip. Human equivalent: a junior engineer running the same shell task by hand.

workloads.label: Market research (medium)
workloads.subtitle: multi-step research + offload
workloads.notes: Research agent that does retrieval, multi-call summarization, and writes a short report. 4 vCPU and 45s wall-clock are typical when offload keeps the heavy step off the agent pod.

scenarios.label: Xeon CWF · small agents
scenarios.story: How dense a single dual-socket CWF node gets when packed with light terminal agents — and how much frontier-API spend that displaces.

scenarios.label: GNR · research workload
scenarios.story: Heavier research agents on a GNR node with multi-call inference and offload — same density story, different price-point.
